matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-additemtocart-001 title: user successfully adds an item to their cart module: add item to cart source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - item name: "mouse" - item price: 29.99 test steps: 1. user logs in. 2. user clicks on the "add item" button. 3. user selects "mouse" as the item name. 4. user enters "29.99" as the item price. 5. user clicks on the "add" button. 6. system adds the item to the cart. 7. system displays a success message. expected result: item is added to the user's cart.
